text:
was a member of the Scout Regiment in the live-action film Attack on Titan, The Movie: Part 1.

Appearance

Minami had long black hair which she kept tied back in two braids. She wore the standard Scout Regiment uniform.

Story

Attack on Titan, The Movie: Part 1

Minami participates in the joint mission between the Scout Regiment, Garrison, and Military Police to seal the hole that was left in the outermost Wall by the Colossal Titan. After the Scouts are abandoned by the Military Police in Omotemachi, Minami and the remaining soldiers take refuge from the attacking Titans atop an abandoned building, but Minami is killed by a nearby Titan that she fails to notice approaching.

Trivia

Minami's name and hairstyle may be homages to the character Mina Carolina from the original series.
